comment.body: Lika Alma told me the market is stochastich not deterministic , I read the weekly post 20 time, try to do the same and visualize how you will build and manage your portfolio with that knowledge that Alma put on the weekly post  ;-) everythink will be more clear ; I don't do 0dte and Alma trade ; this week when the market was up over the weekly point build a options structure theta and delta positive but at the same time I took a long put vertical with shorter expire that totally protected me from the cost of the long structure; so my portfolio compared to the market was alpha and now I have a long position at zero cost that if the market goes up it will give me a positive pnl and alpha compared to the market movement

comment.body: Im saying that we’re seeing buying interest on a small scale but it’s getting absorbed by dealers negative gamma. After the JPM collar rolls it looks like customers are going long risk reversal (image above) where they sell puts and buy calls. That means that the general direction will be down as that’s where liquidity will be and the risk is to the upside. That is based on the positioning at the close (can obviously change). It’s a way of adding more context as to why I think Alma’s call of down post opex is right with risks to a bounce
